title: Plutarch, Moralia: How to Profit by One's Enemies
description: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: How to Profit by One's Enemies.
introduction: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: How to Profit by One's Enemies.

translation.text: From Plutarch's 'How to Profit by One's Enemies': In this essay, Plutarch examines this important aspect of the moral life with his characteristic combination of erudition, anecdote, and practical wisdom.
